---
title: "Account Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
import re
import itertools
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from kalshi_trades import Config, KalshiClient
from kalshi_trades.models import Balance, Position, Order, Fill

client = KalshiClient(Config(env="prod"))

# --- Ticker label helpers ------------------------------------------------
SERIES_LABELS = {
    "KXNBASPREAD":    "NBA Spread",
    "KXNCAAMBSPREAD": "NCAAB Spread",
    "KXNCAAMBGAME":   "NCAAB Game",
    "KXKBLGAME":      "KBL Game",
    "KXGRAMSOTY":     "Grammy SOTY",
    "KXGRAMROTY":     "Grammy ROTY",
    "KXMVESPORTSMULTIGAMEEXTENDED": "MV Esports",
    "KXMVENFLSINGLEGAME": "MV NFL",
    "KXPGATOUR":      "PGA Tour",
    "KXINDYCARRACE":  "IndyCar",
}


def series_label(ticker: str) -> str:
    """Map a raw ticker to a readable series name."""
    m = re.match(r"^(KX[A-Z]+)", ticker)
    return SERIES_LABELS.get(m.group(1), m.group(1)) if m else ticker


def matchup_label(ticker: str) -> str:
    """Extract the matchup / event portion after the date stamp."""
    stripped = re.sub(r"^KX[A-Z]+-\d{2}[A-Z]{3}\d+", "", ticker).lstrip("-")
    if stripped and stripped != ticker:
        return stripped
    parts = ticker.split("-", 1)
    return parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else ticker


def short_label(ticker: str) -> str:
    return f"{series_label(ticker)}: {matchup_label(ticker)}"
```

---

## Balance

```{python}
#| label: balance
bal = Balance.from_api(client.get_balance())
{
    "available":  f"${bal.balance_dollars:.2f}",
    "portfolio":  f"${bal.portfolio_value_dollars:.2f}",
    "total":      f"${bal.balance_dollars + bal.portfolio_value_dollars:.2f}",
}
```

---

## Positions

```{python}
#| label: positions-raw
positions = [
    Position.from_api(p)
    for p in client.paginate_positions(count_filter="position")
]
len(positions)
```

```{python}
#| label: positions-df
schema = {
    "ticker":          pl.String,
    "contracts":       pl.Float64,
    "realized_pnl":    pl.Float64,
    "market_exposure": pl.Float64,
    "total_traded":    pl.Float64,
    "fees_paid":       pl.Float64,
    "resting_orders":  pl.Int64,
}

df_positions = pl.DataFrame(
    [
        {
            "ticker":          p.ticker,
            "contracts":       float(p.position_fp),
            "realized_pnl":    float(p.realized_pnl_dollars or 0),
            "market_exposure": float(p.market_exposure_dollars or 0),
            "total_traded":    float(p.total_traded_dollars or 0),
            "fees_paid":       float(p.fees_paid_dollars or 0),
            "resting_orders":  p.resting_orders_count,
        }
        for p in positions
    ],
    schema=schema,
)
df_positions
```

```{python}
#| label: positions-summary
df_positions.select([
    pl.col("realized_pnl").sum().alias("total_realized_pnl"),
    pl.col("fees_paid").sum().alias("total_fees"),
    pl.col("total_traded").sum().alias("total_traded"),
    pl.col("market_exposure").sum().alias("total_exposure"),
])
```

---

## Order History

```{python}
#| label: orders-raw
orders = [Order.from_api(o) for o in client.paginate_orders()]
len(orders)
```

```{python}
#| label: orders-df
df_orders = pl.DataFrame([
    {
        "order_id":     o.order_id,
        "ticker":       o.ticker,
        "action":       o.action,
        "side":         o.side,
        "type":         o.type,
        "status":       o.status,
        "count":        o.count,
        "yes_price":    o.yes_price,
        "no_price":     o.no_price,
        "created_time": o.created_time,
    }
    for o in orders
])
df_orders
```

```{python}
#| label: orders-by-status
df_orders.group_by("status").agg(pl.len().alias("count")).sort("count", descending=True)
```

```{python}
#| label: orders-by-ticker
df_orders.group_by("ticker").agg(pl.len().alias("orders")).sort("orders", descending=True)
```

---

## Fill History

```{python}
#| label: fills-raw
fills = [Fill.from_api(f) for f in client.paginate_fills()]
len(fills)
```

```{python}
#| label: fills-df
df_fills = pl.DataFrame([
    {
        "fill_id":      f.fill_id,
        "ticker":       f.ticker,
        "action":       f.action,
        "side":         f.side,
        "contracts":    float(f.count_fp),
        "yes_price":    float(f.yes_price_dollars or 0),
        "no_price":     float(f.no_price_dollars or 0),
        "fee":          float(f.fee_cost or 0),
        "is_taker":     f.is_taker,
        "created_time": f.created_time,
    }
    for f in fills
]).with_columns([
    pl.col("created_time").dt.convert_time_zone("America/New_York").dt.date().alias("date"),
    pl.col("ticker").map_elements(series_label, return_dtype=pl.String).alias("series"),
    pl.col("ticker").map_elements(short_label, return_dtype=pl.String).alias("market"),
    (pl.col("contracts") * pl.col("yes_price")).alias("capital"),
    pl.when(pl.col("is_taker")).then(pl.lit("Taker")).otherwise(pl.lit("Maker")).alias("role"),
])
df_fills
```

```{python}
#| label: fills-summary
df_fills.select([
    pl.len().alias("total_fills"),
    pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("total_contracts"),
    pl.col("fee").sum().alias("total_fees"),
    pl.col("capital").sum().alias("total_capital_deployed"),
    (pl.col("fee").sum() / pl.col("capital").sum() * 100).alias("avg_fee_pct"),
])
```

```{python}
#| label: fills-by-ticker
df_fills.group_by("ticker").agg([
    pl.len().alias("fills"),
    pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
    pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
]).sort("fills", descending=True)
```

---

## Analysis

### Activity Over Time

```{python}
#| label: activity-over-time
daily = (
    df_fills
    .group_by("date").agg([
        pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
        pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
        pl.col("capital").sum().alias("capital"),
        pl.len().alias("fills"),
    ])
    .sort("date")
    .with_columns(pl.col("date").cast(pl.String))
)

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_bar(
    x=daily["date"].to_list(),
    y=daily["contracts"].to_list(),
    name="Contracts",
    marker_color="#4c78a8",
    customdata=list(zip(
        daily["fills"].to_list(),
        daily["fees"].to_list(),
        daily["capital"].to_list(),
    )),
    hovertemplate=(
        "<b>%{x}</b><br>"
        "Contracts: %{y:,}<br>"
        "Fills: %{customdata[0]}<br>"
        "Fees: $%{customdata[1]:.2f}<br>"
        "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[2]:.2f}"
        "<extra></extra>"
    ),
)
fig.add_scatter(
    x=daily["date"].to_list(),
    y=daily["capital"].to_list(),
    name="$ Deployed",
    mode="lines+markers",
    line=dict(color="#e45756", width=2),
    yaxis="y2",
    hovertemplate="$ Deployed: $%{y:.2f}<extra></extra>",
)
fig.update_layout(
    title="Daily Activity — Contracts vs $ Deployed",
    xaxis_title=None,
    yaxis=dict(title="Contracts"),
    yaxis2=dict(title="$ Deployed", overlaying="y", side="right", showgrid=False),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", yanchor="bottom", y=1.02),
    hovermode="x unified",
    height=420,
)
fig
```

### Volume by Series

```{python}
#| label: volume-by-series
by_series = (
    df_fills
    .group_by("series").agg([
        pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
        pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
        pl.col("capital").sum().alias("capital"),
        pl.len().alias("fills"),
    ])
    .sort("contracts", descending=True)
)

fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(
    x=by_series["contracts"].to_list(),
    y=by_series["series"].to_list(),
    orientation="h",
    marker_color="#4c78a8",
    customdata=list(zip(
        by_series["fills"].to_list(),
        by_series["fees"].to_list(),
        by_series["capital"].to_list(),
    )),
    hovertemplate=(
        "<b>%{y}</b><br>"
        "Contracts: %{x:,}<br>"
        "Fills: %{customdata[0]}<br>"
        "Fees: $%{customdata[1]:.2f}<br>"
        "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[2]:.2f}"
        "<extra></extra>"
    ),
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Total Volume by Series",
    xaxis_title="Contracts",
    yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
    height=max(350, len(by_series) * 40),
)
fig
```

### Contracts & Fees by Market

```{python}
#| label: market-breakdown
by_market = (
    df_fills
    .group_by("market").agg([
        pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
        pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
        pl.col("capital").sum().alias("capital"),
        pl.len().alias("fills"),
        (pl.col("fee").sum() / pl.col("capital").sum() * 100).alias("fee_pct"),
    ])
    .sort("contracts", descending=True)
)

fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(
    x=by_market["contracts"].to_list(),
    y=by_market["market"].to_list(),
    orientation="h",
    marker=dict(
        color=by_market["fees"].to_list(),
        colorscale="Blues",
        colorbar=dict(title="Fees ($)"),
    ),
    customdata=list(zip(
        by_market["fills"].to_list(),
        by_market["fees"].to_list(),
        by_market["fee_pct"].to_list(),
        by_market["capital"].to_list(),
    )),
    hovertemplate=(
        "<b>%{y}</b><br>"
        "Contracts: %{x:,}<br>"
        "Fills: %{customdata[0]}<br>"
        "Fees: $%{customdata[1]:.2f}<br>"
        "Fee %%: %{customdata[2]:.2f}%%<br>"
        "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[3]:.2f}"
        "<extra></extra>"
    ),
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Contracts by Market (color = fees paid)",
    xaxis_title="Contracts",
    yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
    height=max(450, len(by_market) * 25),
)
fig
```

### Maker vs Taker

```{python}
#| label: maker-taker
role_summary = (
    df_fills
    .group_by("role").agg([
        pl.len().alias("fills"),
        pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
        pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
        pl.col("capital").sum().alias("capital"),
    ])
    .with_columns(
        (pl.col("fees") / pl.col("capital") * 100).alias("fee_pct")
    )
)

colors = {"Maker": "#54a24b", "Taker": "#e45756"}
fig = go.Figure()
for row in role_summary.iter_rows(named=True):
    fig.add_bar(
        x=[row["role"]],
        y=[row["fees"]],
        name=row["role"],
        marker_color=colors.get(row["role"], "#999"),
        text=[f"{row['fills']} fills"],
        textposition="outside",
        customdata=[[row["contracts"], row["fee_pct"], row["capital"]]],
        hovertemplate=(
            "<b>%{x}</b><br>"
            "Fees: $%{y:.2f}<br>"
            "Contracts: %{customdata[0]:,}<br>"
            "Fee %%: %{customdata[1]:.2f}%%<br>"
            "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[2]:.2f}"
            "<extra></extra>"
        ),
    )
fig.update_layout(
    title="Fees Paid by Role",
    yaxis_title="Total Fees ($)",
    showlegend=False,
    height=380,
)
fig
```

### Fee Efficiency by Market

```{python}
#| label: fee-efficiency
by_market_sorted = by_market.sort("fee_pct", descending=True)

fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(
    x=by_market_sorted["fee_pct"].to_list(),
    y=by_market_sorted["market"].to_list(),
    orientation="h",
    marker=dict(
        color=by_market_sorted["fee_pct"].to_list(),
        colorscale="Oranges",
    ),
    customdata=list(zip(
        by_market_sorted["fees"].to_list(),
        by_market_sorted["capital"].to_list(),
        by_market_sorted["contracts"].to_list(),
    )),
    hovertemplate=(
        "<b>%{y}</b><br>"
        "Fee %%: %{x:.2f}%%<br>"
        "Fees: $%{customdata[0]:.2f}<br>"
        "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[1]:.2f}<br>"
        "Contracts: %{customdata[2]:,}"
        "<extra></extra>"
    ),
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Fee Cost as % of Capital Deployed — lower is better",
    xaxis_title="Fee %",
    yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
    height=max(450, len(by_market_sorted) * 25),
)
fig
```

### Buy vs Sell

```{python}
#| label: buy-vs-sell
action_summary = (
    df_fills
    .group_by("action").agg([
        pl.len().alias("fills"),
        pl.col("contracts").sum().alias("contracts"),
        pl.col("fee").sum().alias("fees"),
        pl.col("capital").sum().alias("capital"),
    ])
)

fig = go.Figure(go.Pie(
    labels=action_summary["action"].to_list(),
    values=action_summary["contracts"].to_list(),
    marker=dict(colors=["#4c78a8", "#f58518"]),
    hole=0.4,
    customdata=list(zip(
        action_summary["fills"].to_list(),
        action_summary["fees"].to_list(),
        action_summary["capital"].to_list(),
    )),
    hovertemplate=(
        "<b>%{label}</b><br>"
        "Contracts: %{value:,}<br>"
        "Fills: %{customdata[0]}<br>"
        "Fees: $%{customdata[1]:.2f}<br>"
        "$ Deployed: $%{customdata[2]:.2f}"
        "<extra></extra>"
    ),
))
fig.update_layout(title="Buy vs Sell — Share of Contracts")
fig
```
